```shell
  @ val intermediateKey = participant1.keys.secret.generate_signing_key(name = "NamespaceDelegation", usage = com.digitalasset.canton.crypto.SigningKeyUsage.NamespaceOnly)
      intermediateKey : SigningPublicKey = SigningPublicKey(
        id = 12203fca1331...,
        format = DER-encoded X.509 SubjectPublicKeyInfo,
        keySpec = EC-Curve25519,
        usage = namespace
      )

  @ val intermediateKeyPath = better.files.File("/tmp/canton/certs/intermediate_key.pub").pathAsString
      intermediateKeyPath : String = "/tmp/canton/certs/intermediate_key.pub"

  @ participant1.keys.public.download_to(intermediateKey.id, intermediateKeyPath)
```
